title: calophyllum chapelieri
intro: Calophyllum chapelieri, also known as the 'Cebu Calophyllum', is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of Calophyllum chapelieri include its high content of calophyllolide and other bioactive compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Calophyllum chapelieri is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or extract, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, fever, and gastrointestinal problems.
